display_name_sources: source_facts.repo uses the official OpenSceneGraph repository name.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub project; its README is the official documentation surface available from supplied fields.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says 3D graphics toolkit; source_facts.executables includes osgviewer and other OSG tools.
